evals.prompt: I want to make a skill that turns messy meeting notes into a clean action list and follow-up email. Can you help me build it?
evals.expected_output: The skill creator should capture intent, ask only necessary gaps, draft a plausible SKILL.md structure, and propose starter eval prompts.

evals.prompt: Here is my existing SKILL.md. It works sometimes but misses obvious trigger cases. Audit it and improve the description.
evals.expected_output: The skill creator should move into improvement mode, preserve the skill name, inspect trigger behaviour, propose trigger evals, and revise the description rather than restarting from scratch.

evals.prompt: No full benchmark, just vibe with me and make this skill less clunky.
evals.expected_output: The skill creator should use a lighter workflow, clearly label that this is not full validation, and still make practical improvements.
